README.md.title: Paper2Code-Enhanced
README.md.purpose: A modular, multi-agent AI pipeline for converting scientific papers into verified code repositories.

docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.title: System Architecture
docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.purpose: Details the architecture, orchestrator flow, persistence, sandbox execution details, and module interactions.

docs/GETTING-STARTED.md.title: Getting Started Guide
docs/GETTING-STARTED.md.purpose: Lists prerequisites, environment variables, step-by-step setup guides, installation commands, and first verification checks.

docs/DEVELOPMENT.md.title: Development Guide
docs/DEVELOPMENT.md.purpose: Provides guidelines on style formatting, PEP-484 type hints, local utility setup, branch naming rules, and PR checklist.

docs/TESTING.md.title: Testing Guide
docs/TESTING.md.purpose: Documents the pytest framework setup, suite execution, writing test patterns, and overriding execution variables.

docs/CONFIGURATION.md.title: Configuration Schema
docs/CONFIGURATION.md.purpose: Lists environment settings, RLM persistence pathing, base sandboxing image configurations, and model providers.

CONTRIBUTING.md.title: Contributing Guide
CONTRIBUTING.md.purpose: Outlines guidelines for local sandbox testing, codebase styles, and issue filing conventions.
